report.summary: No delta since v3 — still on 9cc38d1. Middleware SEO blocker (58/1324 indexable) and 111 orphaned slugs remain top carry-overs. 20 uncommitted files (10 OG SVGs, 2 components, reports). All 5 cached API routes healthy; /defi-yields still lacks in-memory cache/fallback.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: No new commits since 9cc38d1 (12:22 UTC+2). No regressions introduced this cycle.
TypeScript errors: 40, all in structured-data.examples.ts (non-production file, unchanged).
6 recently fixed learn pages verified at source level: DVT, MiCA, crypto-arbitrage, RWA-yield, Lido V3 stVaults, Sui Hashi — all have valid exports, metadata, structured data, and correct imports.
Page audit unchanged: 1,252 page.tsx on disk vs 1,324 published slugs — 111 orphaned slugs persist (blog/*, courses/*, compare/*, investing/best/*).
Build config healthy: 7GB heap limit, concurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true. Last Vercel build confirmed at 3m 35s.
Network sandbox prevents live HTTP checks — source-level verification only.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: /api/prices (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 60s in-memory cache, stale fallback, Cache-Control + X-Cache-Source headers.
/api/trending (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 300s cache, 600s stale, degraded fallback with reduced s-maxage.
/api/fear-greed (Alternative.me): HEALTHY — 600s cache, 1200s stale. Missing X-Cache-Source headers (inconsistency).
/api/market-metrics (CoinGecko+Alternative.me): BEST — 60s cache, Promise.allSettled + mock fallback, X-Cache HIT/MISS.
/api/market-dominance (CoinGecko): HEALTHY — 300s cache, dual fallback (stale + hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA).
/api/defi-yields (DefiLlama): AT RISK — CACHE_DURATION constant defined (300s) but NO in-memory cache implemented. No fallback data. Will 500 on upstream failure.
Rate limiter defined in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but only wired into /api/health. All 6 public data routes remain unprotected.
X-Cache-Source headers inconsistent: prices/dominance use it, fear-greed/trending missing, market-metrics uses non-standard 'X-Cache'.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deploy: 9cc38d1 on Vercel. No new deploys this cycle — stabilization hold continues.
CRITICAL SEO BLOCKER persists: Middleware hardcodes 58 pillar pages for 'index, follow'. 1,266 published pages (96%) get 'noindex, follow' — invisible to Google.
20 uncommitted files in working tree: 10 new OG SVGs, 2 modified components (MarketRecapClient, WhaleTrackerClient), 4 modified reports, 4 new reports/files.
Security: .env.local present but not committed. .gitignore properly configured. RESEND_API_KEY and STANDUP_EMAIL_SECRET secured.
Build infra: Next.js 16.1.6, React 19.2.4, TypeScript 5.9.3. Standalone output for Vercel serverless. Webpack chunk splitting configured.
Cache strategy unchanged: pillar 1hr/1d/7d, non-pillar 30m/12hr/1d.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Zero new commits this cycle. Latest commit 9cc38d1 was 12:22 UTC+2. All 8 commits today were pre-cycle build stabilization.
CARRY-OVER (P0): Middleware SEO sync — 96% of site invisible to Google. NEEDS JEFE: auto-sync indexing with PUBLISHED_PAGES vs current 58-page whitelist.
CARRY-OVER (P1): Scaffold 111 orphaned slugs (published but no page.tsx). Active 404 risk for indexed URLs.
CARRY-OVER (P1): Add in-memory cache + fallback to /api/defi-yields following standard pattern.
CARRY-OVER (P2): Wire rate limiter into all 6 public API routes (checkRateLimit already exists).
CARRY-OVER (P2): Standardize X-Cache-Source headers across all API routes.
CARRY-OVER (P2): Clean 40 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts.
CARRY-OVER (P3): Commit + deploy 10 OG SVGs and 2 component updates (market-recap, whale-tracker).
